name: Beaglee Inc.
summary: Beaglee Inc. engages in the content platform business. It operates through Platform and Contents segments. The Platform segment provides subscription and other ancillary businesses centered on Manga Kingdom. The Contents segment offers e-books, publishing, and other ancillary services. The company is involved in the e-book business, which include comics distribution, as well as offers e-novels. It also broadcasts radio programs; and distributes smartphone games. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
